name: crwla
description: CRWLA monorepo — apps/{api,web,mobile} are independent projects with their own lockfiles. This root package only carries top-level metadata.

scripts.dev:all: npm run infra:up && npm run api:dev && npm run web:dev
scripts.api:build: cd apps/api && npm run install && npm run prisma:deploy && npm run prisma:generate && npm run build
scripts.api:migrate: cd apps/api && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.llm:install: cd apps/web-page-extractor-llm && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt && .venv/bin/playwright install chromium
scripts.llm:postgres:up: docker run -d --name wpe-postgres --restart unless-stopped -p 127.0.0.1:5434:5432 -e POSTGRES_USER=wpe -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=wpe -e POSTGRES_DB=wpe -v wpe-postgres-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data pgvector/pgvector:pg16
scripts.llm:migrate: cat apps/web-page-extractor-llm/db/migrations/001_init.sql | docker exec -i wpe-postgres psql -U wpe -d wpe -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1
